parameters.jsCode:
const u = $('Route').first().json;
const text = u.invalidUrl
  ? 'Please provide a valid URL.
Example: /learn https://example.com/article'
  : '👋 *Welcome to the Learning Bot!*

I help you study any article and test yourself.

*Commands:*
/learn <url> — submit a learning material
/quiz — pick a saved topic and take a 5-question quiz
/start — show this help';
return [{ json: { chatId: u.chatId, text, reply_markup: {} } }];

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0 Safari/537.36
